claims.subject: Nate
claims.object: competitive video game player who wins tournaments and earns money
claims.retrieval_text: Nate is a competitive video game player who has won multiple tournaments including CS:GO, Street Fighter, Valorant, and international events, earning money from gaming.

claims.object: loves action and sci-fi movies
claims.retrieval_text: Nate loves action and sci-fi movies and enjoys fantasy films for escapism and imagination.

claims.object: owns pet turtles, has had them for 3+ years
claims.retrieval_text: Nate owns pet turtles he has had for over three years. They bring him calm and joy. He got a third turtle in session 28 from a pet store.

claims.object: makes dairy-free coconut milk ice cream and desserts
claims.retrieval_text: Nate makes dairy-free coconut milk ice cream and other desserts. He started a cooking show teaching vegan ice cream recipes and shares recipes with friends.

claims.retrieval_text: Nate's main hobbies are playing video games and watching movies. He uses them to unwind and escape.

claims.retrieval_text: Nate organized a gaming party with 7 attendees and gave custom controller decorations. They also played chess. 6 of 7 wanted to do it again.

claims.retrieval_text: Nate got a third turtle from a pet store because his tank was big enough and turtles bring him joy.

claims.retrieval_text: Nate upgraded his home gaming equipment where he practices, competes, and plays with friends.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: screenwriter who has had multiple scripts produced into movies
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna is a screenwriter who has written multiple screenplays. At least three of her scripts have been produced and shown on the big screen. She writes dramas about loss, identity, self-discovery, and romance.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: loves dramas and romantic comedies
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna loves dramas, romcoms, and emotionally-driven films. She enjoys getting immersed in feelings and plots.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: hobbies include writing, reading, watching movies, and exploring nature
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna's hobbies include writing, reading, watching movies, hiking, and exploring nature. Nature inspires her writing.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: allergic to most reptiles, animals with fur, and cockroaches
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna has severe allergies to most reptiles, animals with fur, and cockroaches. Her face gets puffy and itchy. She is also lactose intolerant. She had a dog named Tilly in Michigan before developing allergies.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: lactose intolerant, makes dairy-free desserts
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna is lactose intolerant and cannot have dairy. She experiments with dairy-free desserts using coconut milk, almond milk, and almond flour.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: finished first screenplay, a drama and romance, submitted to film festivals
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna finished her first full screenplay, a mix of drama and romance, and submitted it to film festivals hoping producers and directors would notice it.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: started writing a second screenplay about a woman on a self-discovery journey
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna wrote a second screenplay about a thirty-year-old woman on a journey of self-discovery after a loss, inspired by personal experiences. She finished it by March 2022.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: had an audition for a writing gig in March 2022
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna had an audition for a writing gig and had mixed emotions of excitement and anxiety about it.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: joined a writers group and co-wrote Finding Home
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna joined a writers group and felt she finally belonged. She worked on a script called Finding Home about a girl searching for her true home.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: had bits of a screenplay shown on the big screen in June 2022
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna wrote bits for a screenplay that appeared on the big screen, finding it nerve-wracking but inspiring.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: received a rejection letter from a major company for her screenplay
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna received a generic rejection letter from a major production company without feedback, which was disheartening.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: received a second rejection from a production company in October 2022
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna received another rejection from a production company for a screenplay she submitted to a film contest.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: finished her third screenplay about loss, identity, and connection
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna finished her third screenplay about loss, identity, and connection. It was deeply personal and she felt proud of being vulnerable.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: submitted screenplay to a film contest in June 2022
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna submitted her recent screenplay to a film contest to see how others might like it.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: took a road trip to Woodhaven for movie research in July 2022
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna took a research road trip to Woodhaven, a small Midwestern town, visiting its library and finding a 1900s book with stories and sketches that sparked ideas for her next script.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: started writing a book about loss, redemption, and forgiveness
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna started writing a book exploring loss, redemption, and forgiveness. She shared it with her writers group and got great feedback, then finished it with lots of late nights and edits.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: received a touching reader letter about her blog post
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna received a letter from someone who found comfort in her online blog post about a hard moment in her life, reminding her why she loves writing.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: laptop crashed and lost all work in September 2022
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna's laptop crashed and she lost all her work with nothing recoverable. She bought an external drive for backups afterward.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: had a second movie script shown on screen in October 2022
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna had another movie script she contributed to shown on the big screen, the third time this has happened. She found seeing her characters come alive surreal.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: set up meetings with movie producers in November 2022
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna set up meetings with movie producers who loved the self-discovery elements in her script. She felt validated and hopeful.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: is filming her own movie from the road-trip script
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna is filming her own movie based on her road-trip script. An actor on set told her she loved the script.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: finished a presentation for producers in November 2022
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna finished a tough presentation for producers and is working on yet another movie script, a love story with challenges.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: pitched a script to producers and they liked it
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna pitched a script to producers who really liked it, giving her a big confidence boost.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: working on a suspenseful thriller set in a small Midwestern town
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna is working on a new project, a suspenseful thriller set in a small Midwestern town.

claims.object: favorite superhero is Spider-Man
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna's favorite superhero is Spider-Man. She loves Peter Parker's struggle between being a hero and being a person.

claims.object: has an inspiration cork board with quotes, photos, and keepsakes
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna has a cork board full of inspiring quotes, photos, and keepsakes including a family picture that reminds her of love and encouragement.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: nature and hiking provide calm, peace, and writing inspiration
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna finds deep calm and writing inspiration in nature and hiking. She discovered trails in her hometown, hiked at Whispering Falls, and took a sunset photo near Fort Wayne.

claims.object: acted in plays before but shifted to writing
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna used to act in plays and once forgot her lines on stage. Acting was her first passion but she now shines in writing, though she might return to acting someday.

claims.retrieval_text: Joanna used to have a dog named Tilly in Michigan before developing allergies and having to give the dog away.

claims.retrieval_text: Joanna wrote a story at age 10 about a brave little turtle who was scared but explored the world anyway, showing early themes of courage and risk-taking.

claims.object: writing themes center on loss, identity, self-discovery, and romance
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna's writing consistently explores themes of loss, identity, self-discovery, romance, and personal experience. She writes best when being true to herself.

claims.subject: Joanna
claims.object: enjoys DIY projects
claims.retrieval_text: Joanna loves DIY projects. She made a handmade bookmark for a friend in her writing club.

claims.retrieval_text: Joanna has a brother who used to make her cute notes when they were kids. She included one of his childhood letters in a movie script intro.

claims.retrieval_text: Joanna has a cozy movie-watching setup at home with a fluffy couch that fits multiple people, a weighted blanket, and dimmable lights.

claims.retrieval_text: Joanna recommended the movie Little Women to Nate, calling it a great story about sisterhood, love, and reaching for your dreams.

claims.retrieval_text: Nate watched Little Women on Joanna's earlier recommendation and found the acting awesome and story captivating.

claims.retrieval_text: Nate gave Joanna a stuffed animal dog to remind her of good vibes, since she cannot have real pets due to allergies.

claims.retrieval_text: Nate met a couple nearby while walking Max. They planned doggy playdates. They bonded over a shared love of animals.

claims.retrieval_text: Joanna hiked to Whispering Falls in her hometown, finding the rushing water, dark sky, and green scenery peaceful and inspiring.

claims.retrieval_text: Joanna found old notebooks with her early writings and enjoyed seeing how far she has come as a writer.

claims.retrieval_text: Joanna keeps a journal that she calls her rock. Writing has become a huge part of her identity and an escape to express feelings.
